pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/broken_compose_diagnosis/setup_task.sh (lines 24-38) sets APP_DIR to /home/ga/app-debug and creates the application directories there.
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/broken_compose_diagnosis/setup_task.sh (lines 115-149) writes nginx service ports "8080:80" into docker-compose.yml.
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/broken_compose_diagnosis/setup_task.sh (lines 115-150) defines services flask, nginx, and db in docker-compose.yml.
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/broken_compose_diagnosis/README.md 'The Three Bugs' section lists the wrong DB hostname, missing network, and undeclared volume bugs.

privileged_info_summary: The setup_task.sh script recreates the entire Flask/nginx/mysql stack under /home/ga/app-debug (app code, Dockerfile, nginx config, and docker-compose.yml), so the data is synthetic; the compose file there defines flask, nginx, and db services with nginx exposing port 8080, and README.md details three deliberate configuration bugs (wrong DB host, missing network membership, and an undeclared db_data volume) that agents must fix.
